rule: Canonical run allocates run_dir via createSwitchingRunContext -> createRunContext under results/switching/runs/<run_id>
notes: assertSwitchingRunDirCanonical checks run.run_dir before manifest write

rule: run_dir exists before status/artifact writes
notes: createRunContext creates run_dir; runner also mkdir guards

rule: execution_status.csv exists in run_dir with schema EXECUTION_STATUS,INPUT_FOUND,ERROR_MESSAGE,N_T,MAIN_RESULT_SUMMARY
notes: writeSwitchingExecutionStatus is authoritative writer

rule: Non-final checkpoints use EXECUTION_STATUS=PARTIAL only
notes: Runner writes PARTIAL checkpoints; writer rejects non-PARTIAL non-final

rule: Final status is SUCCESS or FAILED (never PARTIAL)
notes: Writer enforces final-state validity

rule: run_manifest.json exists for each canonical run
notes: createRunContext writes immutable manifest

rule: Fingerprint is present in manifest (git_commit, script_path, script_hash, matlab_version, host, user)
notes: computeRunFingerprint + writeManifest defaults unknown/empty when unavailable

rule: Failure path allocates canonical run_dir and writes final FAILED execution_status.csv
notes: catch path uses allocateSwitchingFailureRunContext then final FAILED write

rule: Allowed canonical outputs include run_dir/tables/*
notes: Runner writes all science/status tables under run_dir/tables

rule: Allowed canonical outputs include run_dir/reports/*
notes: Runner writes reports under run_dir/reports

rule: Allowed canonical outputs include run_dir/execution_status.csv
notes: Authoritative final outcome column EXECUTION_STATUS

rule: Allowed canonical outputs include run_dir/run_manifest.json with fingerprint fields
notes: Manifest created by createRunContext for success and failure allocation paths

rule: Valid artifact: file written inside run_dir for the active canonical run
notes: Path discipline is implemented by current entrypoint/helper usage; no global filesystem guard

rule: Forbidden: writes outside active run_dir as canonical outputs
notes: Phase 5F removed marker fallback global write; contract remains run-scoped

rule: RUN_VALIDITY=INVALID when run_dir exists but execution_status.csv is missing
notes: writeRunValidityClassification writes reason Missing execution_status.csv

rule: RUN_VALIDITY=CANONICAL when createRunContext resolution matches repo, switching-isolated run_dir signal is true, and enforcement_checked true
notes: Computed in writeRunValidityClassification

rule: RUN_VALIDITY=NON_CANONICAL when execution_status.csv exists but canonical signal set is incomplete
notes: Reason line lists failing signals

rule: Classification signals are detection-only and do not alter execution_status or pipeline flow
notes: Function intentionally never throws and is post-hoc

rule: Canonical identity is defined by designated canonical entrypoint execution, not by filename/location heuristics alone
notes: Current runtime classification also checks createRunContext resolution and run_dir isolation

rule: Current switching canonical entrypoint: Switching/analysis/run_switching_canonical.m
notes: Phase 5F validated behavior and active canonical runner

rule: New canonical module entrypoint must allocate context via createRunContext (or module wrapper) before outputs
notes: Pattern enforced when helper is used; contract defines required structure

rule: New canonical module must write final execution_status.csv via module status writer
notes: Writer enforces status schema/values once called

rule: New canonical module must produce run-scoped tables/reports and manifest/fingerprint artifacts
notes: Manifest/fingerprint enforced by createRunContext path

rule: New canonical module must emit run_validity classification as detection-only annotation
notes: writeRunValidityClassification is non-blocking and post-hoc

rule: Contracts introduce no new mechanisms and reflect current switching canonical behavior
notes: Documentation-only formalization
